message:
fix(node): bound unbounded Vec pushes in ecosystem_registry, benchmark_methodology, external_replication_claims

- ecosystem_registry: lineage and compatibility pushes bounded (MAX_LINEAGE_ENTRIES=4096, MAX_COMPATIBILITY_ENTRIES=4096)
- benchmark_methodology: citations push bounded (MAX_CITATIONS=4096)
- external_replication_claims: evidence_refs push bounded (MAX_EVIDENCE_REFS=4096)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
